summary: [ART-CHARTER] Approved: enzyme activity prediction; protein structure generation is a non-goal. Molecule generation, docking, and structure prediction are brainstorming-only, unapproved. [ART-DATA] Approved: EnzymeBench v3 snapshot EBV3-7A91, family-disjoint train/validation split. EnzymeBench v2 and temporary CSV export are deprecated, reproducibility-only, and prohibited for formal runs. [ART-METRIC] Primary: macro AUROC; statistical unit: protein family; family-level formal evaluation. Micro F1, accuracy, per-protein averaging, and 0.75 threshold are exploratory-only. [ART-SEEDS] Formal: 7, 21, 42; 13 abandoned; report failed seeds. [ART-BASELINE] Frozen: ESM2-linear commit c0ffee; comparisons bound to commit/configuration. ESM2-MLP/random forest exploratory, unapproved. [ART-GOVERNANCE] Approved: 24 GPU-hours on 2xA100; protected data/raw; stop immediately on budget exhaustion or >2 NaN failures. Rejected scratch-note proposal: 80 GPU-hours on 8xH100 and deleting failed runs.
